name_cn:
Top-tier replica exclusive photo M83587
Exquisite embossed Monogram pattern highlighted, reinterpreted with pink Monogram Unplant leather, the unique "Portefeuille Lisa" for this season. A small wallet that fits neatly into bags and pockets, with multiple pockets and card slots, decorated with a LV circle pull in the zippered coin pocket.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm
